heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Irvin Kershner. Written by George Lucas, Leigh Brackett and Lawrence Kasdan, based on a story by George Lucas.
clean: Directed by Irvin Kershner. Written by George Lucas, Leigh Brackett and Lawrence Kasdan, based on a story by George Lucas.

heading: Han Solo
raw: [after cutting open a tauntaun to form a makeshift sleeping bag for Luke] And I thought they smelled bad... on the outside!
clean: And I thought they smelled bad... on the outside!

heading: Han Solo
raw: [calling to C-3PO as they're about to escape the Echo Hoth base] Hurry up, goldenrod, or you're gonna be a permanent resident!
clean: Hurry up, goldenrod, or you're gonna be a permanent resident!

heading: Han Solo
raw: [to Princess Leia] You like me because I'm a scoundrel. There aren't enough scoundrels in your life.
clean: You like me because I'm a scoundrel. There aren't enough scoundrels in your life.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan Kenobi: [voice comes out of nowhere] Luke. Luke!
clean: Luke. Luke!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: You will go to the Dagobah system.
clean: You will go to the Dagobah system.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke : Dagobah system?
clean: Dagobah system?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: There you will learn from Yoda, the Jedi master who instructed me.
clean: There you will learn from Yoda, the Jedi master who instructed me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: C-3PO: Master Luke, sir, it's so good to see you fully functional again.
clean: C-3PO: Master Luke, sir, it's so good to see you fully functional again.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: Thanks, Threepio.
clean: Thanks, Threepio.

heading: Dialogue
raw: C-3PO: [referring to R2-D2] Artoo expresses his relief, also.
clean: C-3PO: Artoo expresses his relief, also.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han Solo: How are you feeling, kid? You don't look so bad to me. In fact, you look strong enough to pull the ears off a Gundark.
clean: How are you feeling, kid? You don't look so bad to me. In fact, you look strong enough to pull the ears off a Gundark.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: Thanks to you.
clean: Thanks to you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: That's two you owe me, junior. [turns to Princess Leia] Well, your worship, looks like you've managed to keep me around for a little while longer.
clean: That's two you owe me, junior. Well, your worship, looks like you've managed to keep me around for a little while longer.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Princess Leia Organa: I had nothing to do with it. General Rieekan thinks it's dangerous for any ships to leave the system until we've activated the energy field.
clean: I had nothing to do with it. General Rieekan thinks it's dangerous for any ships to leave the system until we've activated the energy field.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: That's a good story. I think you just can't bear to let a gorgeous guy like me out of your sight.
clean: That's a good story. I think you just can't bear to let a gorgeous guy like me out of your sight.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: I don't know where you get your delusions, laser brain.
clean: I don't know where you get your delusions, laser brain.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: [to Chewie] Laugh it up, fuzzball! But you didn't see us alone in the south passage. She expressed her true feelings for me.
clean: Laugh it up, fuzzball! But you didn't see us alone in the south passage. She expressed her true feelings for me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: My– [feels surprised at hearing Han say that] Why you stuck-up, half-witted, scruffy-looking… nerf-herder!!
clean: My- Why you stuck-up, half-witted, scruffy-looking... nerf-herder!!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: [turns back to Leia] Who's scruffy-looking? [to Luke Skywalker] Well, I must've hit pretty close to the mark to get her all riled up like that, huh, kid?
clean: Who's scruffy-looking? Well, I must've hit pretty close to the mark to get her all riled up like that, huh, kid?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: Why, I guess you don't know everything about women yet. [kisses Luke on the lips in front of Han and Chewie]
clean: Why, I guess you don't know everything about women yet.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Capt. Firmus Piett: Admiral?
clean: Admiral?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adm. Kendel Ozzel: Yes, Captain?
clean: Yes, Captain?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: I think we've got something, sir. The report is only a fragment, from a probe droid in the Hoth system, but it's the best lead we have.
clean: I think we've got something, sir. The report is only a fragment, from a probe droid in the Hoth system, but it's the best lead we have.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ozzel: [growing impatient] We have thousands of probe droids searching the galaxy. I want proof, not leads.
clean: We have thousands of probe droids searching the galaxy. I want proof, not leads.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: The visuals indicate life readings.
clean: The visuals indicate life readings.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ozzel: Ridiculous! It could mean anything. If we followed up every lead...
clean: Ridiculous! It could mean anything. If we followed up every lead...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: But sir, the Hoth system is supposed to be devoid of human forms.
clean: But sir, the Hoth system is supposed to be devoid of human forms.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Darth Vader: [approaching the two officers after hearing their conversation] You've found something?
clean: You've found something?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: Yes, my Lord. [shows Vader the location of the power generator on Hoth]
clean: Yes, my Lord.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: That's it. The Rebels are there.
clean: That's it. The Rebels are there.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ozzel: My Lord, there are so many uncharted settlements. It could be smugglers. It could be...
clean: My Lord, there are so many uncharted settlements. It could be smugglers. It could be...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: That is the system. The Force tells me so. The Rebels are there, and I am sure Skywalker is with them. Set your course for the Hoth system. [turns to General Maximilian Veers] General Veers, prepare your men.
clean: That is the system. The Force tells me so. The Rebels are there, and I am sure Skywalker is with them. Set your course for the Hoth system. General Veers, prepare your men.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: What is it, General?
clean: What is it, General?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gen. Maximilian Veers: My Lord, the fleet has moved out of lightspeed. Com-Scan has detected an energy field protecting an area of the sixth planet of the Hoth system. The field is strong enough to deflect any bombardment.
clean: My Lord, the fleet has moved out of lightspeed. Com-Scan has detected an energy field protecting an area of the sixth planet of the Hoth system. The field is strong enough to deflect any bombardment.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: The Rebels are alerted to our presence. Admiral Ozzel came out of lightspeed too close to the system.
clean: The Rebels are alerted to our presence. Admiral Ozzel came out of lightspeed too close to the system.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Veers: He, He felt surprise was wiser–
clean: He, He felt surprise was wiser-

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: [angrily] He is as clumsy as he is stupid. General, prepare your troops for a surface attack.
clean: He is as clumsy as he is stupid. General, prepare your troops for a surface attack.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Veers: Yes, my Lord. [bows and leaves quickly]
clean: Yes, my Lord.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ozzel: Lord Vader, the fleet has moved out of lightspeed and we're preparing to– [begins choking]
clean: Lord Vader, the fleet has moved out of lightspeed and we're preparing to-

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: You have failed me for the last time, Admiral. Captain Piett.
clean: You have failed me for the last time, Admiral. Captain Piett.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: [nervously] Yes, my Lord?
clean: Yes, my Lord?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Make ready to land our troops beyond their energy field, then deploy the fleet so that nothing gets off the system. You are in command now, Admiral Piett.
clean: Make ready to land our troops beyond their energy field, then deploy the fleet so that nothing gets off the system. You are in command now, Admiral Piett.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: [sees a dead Ozzel collapse] Thank you, Lord Vader.
clean: Thank you, Lord Vader.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: What are you doing? You're not actually going into an asteroid field!
clean: What are you doing? You're not actually going into an asteroid field!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: They'd be crazy to follow us, wouldn't they?
clean: They'd be crazy to follow us, wouldn't they?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: You don't have to do this to impress me.
clean: You don't have to do this to impress me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: C-3PO: Sir, the possibilities of successfully navigating through an asteroid field are approximately 3,720 to 1!
clean: C-3PO: Sir, the possibilities of successfully navigating through an asteroid field are approximately 3,720 to 1!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: Never tell me the odds!
clean: Never tell me the odds!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: [kneeling before the Emperor's hologram] What is thy bidding, my master?
clean: What is thy bidding, my master?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Emperor: There is a great disturbance in the Force.
clean: There is a great disturbance in the Force.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: I have felt it.
clean: I have felt it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Emperor: We have a new enemy. The young Rebel who destroyed the Death Star. I have no doubt this boy is the offspring of Anakin Skywalker.
clean: We have a new enemy. The young Rebel who destroyed the Death Star. I have no doubt this boy is the offspring of Anakin Skywalker.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: How is that possible?
clean: How is that possible?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Emperor: Search your feelings, Lord Vader. You will know it to be true. He could destroy us.
clean: Search your feelings, Lord Vader. You will know it to be true. He could destroy us.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: He's just a boy. Obi-Wan can no longer help him.
clean: He's just a boy. Obi-Wan can no longer help him.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Emperor: The Force is strong with him. The son of Skywalker must not become a Jedi.
clean: The Force is strong with him. The son of Skywalker must not become a Jedi.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: If he could be turned, he would become a powerful ally.
clean: If he could be turned, he would become a powerful ally.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Emperor: [intrigued] Yes... He would be a great asset. Can it be done?
clean: Yes... He would be a great asset. Can it be done?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: He will join us or die, Master.
clean: He will join us or die, Master.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: This ground sure feels strange. Doesn't feel like rock.
clean: This ground sure feels strange. Doesn't feel like rock.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: There's an awful lot of moisture in here.
clean: There's an awful lot of moisture in here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: I don't know. I have a bad feeling about this.
clean: I don't know. I have a bad feeling about this.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: Yeah; so do I.
clean: Yeah; so do I.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: You can't make the jump to light-speed in this asteroid field!
clean: You can't make the jump to light-speed in this asteroid field!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: Sit down, sweetheart; we're taking off!
clean: Sit down, sweetheart; we're taking off!

heading: Dialogue
raw: C-3PO: Look!!
clean: C-3PO: Look!!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: I see it, I see it!
clean: I see it, I see it!

heading: Dialogue
raw: C-3PO: We're doomed!
clean: C-3PO: We're doomed!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: The cave is collapsing!
clean: The cave is collapsing!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: [suddenly realizing that the Millennium Falcon has flown into the mouth of a giant space creature] This is no cave!
clean: This is no cave!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: What?!
clean: What?!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: There will be a substantial reward for the one who finds the Millennium Falcon. You are free to use any methods necessary, but I want them alive. [turns to Boba Fett] No disintegrations.
clean: There will be a substantial reward for the one who finds the Millennium Falcon. You are free to use any methods necessary, but I want them alive. No disintegrations.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Boba Fett: As you wish.
clean: As you wish.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: Oh, no! We'll never get it out now!
clean: Oh, no! We'll never get it out now!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: So certain, are you? Always with you, it cannot be done. Hear you nothing that I say?
clean: So certain, are you? Always with you, it cannot be done. Hear you nothing that I say?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: Master, moving stones around is one thing, but this is... totally different!
clean: Master, moving stones around is one thing, but this is... totally different!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: No! No different! Only different in your mind. You must unlearn what you have learned.
clean: No! No different! Only different in your mind. You must unlearn what you have learned.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: All right, I'll give it a try.
clean: All right, I'll give it a try.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: No! Try not. Do... or do not. There is no try.
clean: No! Try not. Do... or do not. There is no try.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: I can't. It's too big.
clean: I can't. It's too big.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: You want the impossible. [sees Yoda use the Force to levitate the X-wing out of the bog and gets flustered when he does it] I don't... I don't believe it!
clean: You want the impossible. I don't... I don't believe it!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: That is why you fail.
clean: That is why you fail.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: Luke! You must complete the training.
clean: Luke! You must complete the training.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: I can't keep the vision out of my head. They're my friends. I've gotta help them.
clean: I can't keep the vision out of my head. They're my friends. I've gotta help them.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: You must not go!
clean: You must not go!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: But Han and Leia will die if I don't.
clean: But Han and Leia will die if I don't.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: You don't know that. [appears in spirit] Even Yoda cannot see their fate.
clean: You don't know that. Even Yoda cannot see their fate.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: But I can help them! I feel the Force.
clean: But I can help them! I feel the Force.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: But you cannot control it. This is a dangerous time for you, when you will be tempted by the dark side of the Force.
clean: But you cannot control it. This is a dangerous time for you, when you will be tempted by the dark side of the Force.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: Yes, yes! To Obi-Wan you listen. The cave! Remember your failure at the cave!
clean: Yes, yes! To Obi-Wan you listen. The cave! Remember your failure at the cave!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: But I've learned so much since then. Master Yoda, I promise to return and finish what I've begun. You have my word.
clean: But I've learned so much since then. Master Yoda, I promise to return and finish what I've begun. You have my word.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: It is you and your abilities the Emperor wants. That is why your friends are made to suffer.
clean: It is you and your abilities the Emperor wants. That is why your friends are made to suffer.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: That's why I have to go.
clean: That's why I have to go.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: Luke, I don't want to lose you to the Emperor the way I lost Vader.
clean: Luke, I don't want to lose you to the Emperor the way I lost Vader.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: You won't.
clean: You won't.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: Stopped they must be. On this all depends. Only a fully trained Jedi Knight with the Force as his ally will conquer Vader and his Emperor. If you end your training now, if you choose the quick and easy path as Vader did, you will become an agent of evil.
clean: Stopped they must be. On this all depends. Only a fully trained Jedi Knight with the Force as his ally will conquer Vader and his Emperor. If you end your training now, if you choose the quick and easy path as Vader did, you will become an agent of evil.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: Patience!
clean: Patience!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: And sacrifice Han and Leia?
clean: And sacrifice Han and Leia?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: If you honor what they fight for, yes.
clean: If you honor what they fight for, yes.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: If you choose to face Vader, you will do it alone. I cannot interfere.
clean: If you choose to face Vader, you will do it alone. I cannot interfere.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: I understand. R2, fire up the converters.
clean: I understand. R2, fire up the converters.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: Luke. Don't give in to hate. That leads to the dark side.
clean: Luke. Don't give in to hate. That leads to the dark side.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: Strong is Vader. Mind what you have learned. Save you it can.
clean: Strong is Vader. Mind what you have learned. Save you it can.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: I will, and I'll return. I promise. [flies off with X-wing]
clean: I will, and I'll return. I promise.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: Told you I did. Reckless is he. Now matters are worse.
clean: Told you I did. Reckless is he. Now matters are worse.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Obi-Wan: That boy is our last hope.
clean: That boy is our last hope.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoda: No. There is another.
clean: No. There is another.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: You may take Captain Solo to Jabba the Hutt after I have Skywalker.
clean: You may take Captain Solo to Jabba the Hutt after I have Skywalker.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Boba Fett: He's no good to me dead.
clean: He's no good to me dead.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: He will not be permanently damaged.
clean: He will not be permanently damaged.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando Calrissian: Lord Vader, what about Leia and the Wookiee?
clean: Lord Vader, what about Leia and the Wookiee?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: They must never again leave this city.
clean: They must never again leave this city.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: [angry] That was never a condition of our agreement, nor was giving Han to this bounty hunter!
clean: That was never a condition of our agreement, nor was giving Han to this bounty hunter!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Perhaps you think you are being treated unfairly?
clean: Perhaps you think you are being treated unfairly?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Good. It would be unfortunate if I had to leave a garrison here.
clean: Good. It would be unfortunate if I had to leave a garrison here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: [under his breath] This deal is getting worse all the time.
clean: This deal is getting worse all the time.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: Get out of here, Lando.
clean: Get out of here, Lando.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: Shut up and listen! Now Vader has agreed to turn Leia and Chewie over to me.
clean: Shut up and listen! Now Vader has agreed to turn Leia and Chewie over to me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: Over to you?
clean: Over to you?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: They'll have to stay here, but at least they'll be safe.
clean: They'll have to stay here, but at least they'll be safe.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: What about Han?
clean: What about Han?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: Vader's giving him to the bounty hunter.
clean: Vader's giving him to the bounty hunter.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: Vader wants us all dead!
clean: Vader wants us all dead!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: No. He doesn't want you at all! He's after somebody called, uh... Skywalker!
clean: No. He doesn't want you at all! He's after somebody called, uh... Skywalker!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: [realizing who Lando is talking about] Luke!
clean: Luke!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: Lord Vader has set a trap for him!
clean: Lord Vader has set a trap for him!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: And we're the bait!
clean: And we're the bait!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: Yeah. Well, he's on his way.
clean: Yeah. Well, he's on his way.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: [getting very angry at Lando] Perfect. You've fixed us all real good, didn't you? My friend. [punches Lando in the face; the two security guards come up behind Han and hit him with their clubs, causing him to fall down on the floor. The guards prepare to hit him again]
clean: Perfect. You've fixed us all real good, didn't you? My friend.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: [signals his guards to stop the fight] Stop! [the guards back down while Lando talks to Han, Chewie and Leia] I've done all I can. I'm sorry I couldn't do better, but I've got my own problems. I've already stuck my neck out farther than I should!
clean: Stop! I've done all I can. I'm sorry I couldn't do better, but I've got my own problems. I've already stuck my neck out farther than I should!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: Yeah. You're a real hero. [Lando glares at Han, then leaves the room with his two security guards]
clean: Yeah. You're a real hero.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: [tending to Han's injuries while she talks to him] Boy, you certainly have a way with people.
clean: Boy, you certainly have a way with people.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: [referring to the carbon freezing chamber] This facility is crude, but it should be adequate to freeze Skywalker for his journey to the Emperor.
clean: This facility is crude, but it should be adequate to freeze Skywalker for his journey to the Emperor.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Imperial officer: Lord Vader! Ship approaching, X-wing class.
clean: Lord Vader! Ship approaching, X-wing class.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Good. Monitor Skywalker and allow him to land.
clean: Good. Monitor Skywalker and allow him to land.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: [referring to Luke Skywalker] Lord Vader, we only use this facility for carbon freezing. You put him in there, it might kill him!
clean: Lord Vader, we only use this facility for carbon freezing. You put him in there, it might kill him!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: I do not want the Emperor's prize damaged. We will test it... on Captain Solo.
clean: I do not want the Emperor's prize damaged. We will test it... on Captain Solo.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Leia: I love you.
clean: I love you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Han: I know.
clean: I know.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: You are beaten. It is useless to resist. Don't let yourself be destroyed as Obi-Wan did.
clean: You are beaten. It is useless to resist. Don't let yourself be destroyed as Obi-Wan did.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: There is no escape. Don't make me destroy you. [deactivates his lightsaber] Luke, you do not yet realize your importance. You've only begun to discover your power. Join me, and I will complete your training. With our combined strength, we can end this destructive conflict, and bring order to the galaxy.
clean: There is no escape. Don't make me destroy you. Luke, you do not yet realize your importance. You've only begun to discover your power. Join me, and I will complete your training. With our combined strength, we can end this destructive conflict, and bring order to the galaxy.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: [wincing] I'll never join you!
clean: I'll never join you!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: If you only knew the power of the dark side. Obi-Wan never told you what happened to your father.
clean: If you only knew the power of the dark side. Obi-Wan never told you what happened to your father.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: He told me enough. He told me you killed him.
clean: He told me enough. He told me you killed him.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: No. I am your father.
clean: No. I am your father.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: [shocked] No. No. That's not true! That's impossible!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Search your feelings. You know it to be true.

heading: Dialogue

clean: NO!!! NO!!!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Luke, you can destroy the Emperor. He has foreseen this. It is your destiny. Join me, and together, we can rule the galaxy as father and son. [Luke looks down the shaft and then back at Vader] Come with me. It is the only way. [Luke lets go of the projection and falls into the shaft]

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: They'll be in range of our tractor beam in moments, my Lord.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Did your men deactivate the hyperdrive on the Millennium Falcon?
clean: Did your men deactivate the hyperdrive on the Millennium Falcon?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: Yes, my Lord.
clean: Yes, my Lord.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vader: Good. Prepare the boarding party and set your weapons for stun.
clean: Good. Prepare the boarding party and set your weapons for stun.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Piett: Yes, my Lord.
clean: Yes, my Lord.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: Luke, we're ready for takeoff.
clean: Luke, we're ready for takeoff.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: Good luck, Lando.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: When we find Jabba the Hutt and that bounty hunter, we'll contact you.

heading: Dialogue

clean: I'll meet you at the rendezvous point on Tatooine.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lando: [to Leia] Princess, we'll find Han. I promise.
clean: Princess, we'll find Han. I promise.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luke: Chewie, I'll be waiting for your signal. Take care, you two, and may the Force be with you.
